clips.title: The Field
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A golden wheat field at sunset, warm haze in the air. The scene is lit by rich golden-hour light, the low sun casting a warm glow and a bright rim of light around the person, long shadows. A person in a light linen shirt stands in the wheat, backlit by the sun. Warm golden-hour light, glowing rim, lens haze, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: City Rooftop
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A city rooftop at sunset, skyline glowing behind. The scene is lit by warm golden-hour light, the low sun rimming the person with gold, soft warm haze. A person in a smart jacket stands at the edge, backlit by the setting sun. Warm golden-hour light, glowing rim, city haze, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Shore
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day. A beach at golden hour, gentle surf, warm sky. The scene is lit by rich golden-hour light, the low sun glowing behind the person and rimming them with warm light, sparkles on the water. A person in rolled linen trousers stands at the waterline, backlit. Warm golden-hour light, glowing rim, sea sparkle, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
